2603.14212.title: Memory as Asset: From Agent-centric to Human-centric Memory Management
2603.14212.paper_summary: We proudly introduce Memory-as-Asset, a new memory paradigm towards human-centric artificial general intelligence (AGI). In this paper, we formally emphasize that human-centric, personal memory management is a prerequisite for complementing the collective knowledge of existing large language models (LLMs) and extending their knowledge boundaries through self-evolution. We introduce three key features that shape the Memory-as-Asset era: (1) Memory in Hand, which emphasizes human-centric ownership to maximize benefits to humans; (2) Memory Group, which provides collaborative knowledge formation to avoid memory islands, and (3) Collective Memory Evolution, which enables continuous knowledge growth to extend the boundary of knowledge towards AGI. We finally give a potential three-layer memory infrastructure to facilitate the Memory-as-Asset paradigm, with fast personal memory storage, an intelligent evolution layer, and a decentralized memory exchange network. Together, these components outline a foundational architecture in which personal memories become persistent digital assets that can be accumulated, shared, and evolved over time. We believe this paradigm provides a promising path toward scalable, human-centric AGI systems that continuously grow through the collective experiences of individuals and intelligent agents.
2603.14212.paper_summary_zh: 我們自豪地介紹「記憶作為資產」（Memory-as-Asset），這是一種面向人類的人工通用智能（AGI）新記憶範式。<lb/>在本文中，我們正式強調以人為中心的個人記憶管理是補充現有大型語言模型（LLMs）集體知識的先決條件，並通過自我進化擴展其知識邊界。<lb/>我們介紹了塑造「記憶作為資產」時代的三個關鍵特徵：（1）手中的記憶（Memory in Hand），強調以人為中心的擁有權，以最大化對人類的利益；（2）記憶群體（Memory Group），提供協作知識形成以避免記憶孤島；（3）集體記憶進化（Collective Memory Evolution），使持續的知識增長成為可能，以擴展知識邊界朝向AGI。<lb/>最後，我們提出了一個潛在的三層記憶基礎設施，以促進「記憶作為資產」範式，包括快速的個人記憶存儲、一個智能進化層和一個去中心化的記憶交換網絡。<lb/>這些組件共同勾勒出一個基礎架構，其中個人記憶成為持久的數位資產，可以隨著時間的推移進行累積、共享和進化。<lb/>我們相信這一範式為可擴展的以人為中心的AGI系統提供了一條有前景的道路，這些系統通過個體和智能代理的集體經驗不斷增長。
2603.14212.author: Yanqi Pan et.al.
2603.14212.authors: Yanqi Pan, Qinghao Huang, Weihao Yang
